details: Supports stress anxiety crisis referrals and mental health concerns for students who may need personal support in addition to academic advising.
Helps students request accommodations coordinate documentation and work with instructors on accessibility needs.
Supports resume reviews internship preparation career exploration and graduate school planning.
Answers questions about aid packages SAP requirements scholarships billing support and enrollment impacts.
Supports course registration transcript requests enrollment verification withdrawal deadlines and academic record updates.

resource: Center for Academic Success and Achievement
details: Supports tutoring study skills time management and academic recovery planning for students who need stronger semester-to-semester habits.
Helps students understand transfer-credit evaluation articulation questions and how prior coursework fits degree progress.
Coordinates referrals when academic concerns overlap with wellness accommodations attendance issues or broader student-support needs.
